The '''YG-4400 light freighter''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] created by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] around [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. The main distinguishing feature of the YG-4400 was their armament, which included a getaway concussion missile launcher.
